title: codonopsis elliptica
intro: Codonopsis elliptica, also known as Dangshen or Chinese Codonopsis, is a type of flowering plant native to China, belonging to the Campanulaceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to tonify the spleen and lungs, and its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Codonopsis elliptica include improved immune function, increased energy levels, and reduced stress and anxiety. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, decoctions, and capsules, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
